ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR PLAINTIFF'S ECONOHOMES LLC PETITION TO ENFORCE SUBPOENA IN PART, AND TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS HEARING SET FOR OCT-20-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF'S ECONOHOMES LLC'S PETITION TO ENFORCE SUBPOENA IN PART, AND TO COMPEL PRODUCTION OF BUSINESS RECORDS IS OFF CALENDAR. THE COURT DID NOT RECEIVE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS, EVEN ASSUMING THAT SUCH PAPERS WERE FILED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, NOT REPORTED.

DEPONENT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS AT THE LOCATION SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S 8/10/11 SUBPOENA NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 28, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena In Part, And To Compel Production Of Business Records Per Ccp 2025.480 & 2029.600
Off Calendar Oct-26-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. D. AUSTIN HARE OF LITTLER MENDELSON, TEL. NO. 288-6356 APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONER;
SHAUN M. HILLIN, TEL. NO. (786) 280-3718, RESPONDENT APPEARING BY TELEPHONE.

RULING - A R G U E D; PLAINTIFF ECONOHOMES, LLC'S Amended Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Enforce Subpoena In Part, And To Compel Production Of Business Records Per Ccp 2025.480 & 2029.600 IS GRANTED. DEPONENT IS ORDERED TO PRODUCE THE DOCUMENTS AT THE LOCATION SPECIFIED IN PLAINTIFF'S 8/10/11 SUBPOENA NO LATER THAN OCTOBER 28, 2011. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)

Plaintiff'S Econohomes Llc Petition To Enforce Subpoena In Part, And To Compel Production Of Business Records
Off Calendar Oct-20-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff'S Econohomes Llc's Petition To Enforce Subpoena In Part, And To Compel Production Of Business Records is Off calendar. The court did not receive courtesy copies of the moving papers, even assuming that such papers were filed. Judge: Harold Kahn, not reported.
